scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:cloudflare: concurrently -k -n api,web,cf-api,cf-web -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cloudflared tunnel --url http://127.0.0.1:4000" "cloudflared tunnel --url http://127.0.0.1:5173"
